overall.description: A first-person walk through a snowy Viking coastal settlement in a video game. The player moves from a waterfront archway along snowy paths, past wooden structures and totems, through a fortified gate with red banners, and into a settlement with a distinctive dragon-headed longhouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy waterfront with wooden dock and arch gate

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy shoreline past a wooden arch gate and a large boathouse structure

entered.detail: tall wooden gate with crescent moon symbol on top, leading to the water
calm frozen water body stretching to the horizon
large curved wooden structure on the shore with smoke rising from behind
snow-covered mountain range visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy waterfront with a distinctive wooden arch gate framing the frozen sea. The camera moves forward along the shore, passing a large wooden boathouse on the left, with snow-covered mountains visible in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy hillside trail with wooden totem poles

events.description: moving away from the waterfront up a snowy hillside path

agents.ego_description: walking up the snowy slope along a winding path lined with wooden totems and pine trees

entered.detail: tall wooden poles with carved decorations lining the path
evergreen trees covered in snow on the hillside
large boulder outcropping on the snowy hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the waterfront behind, the path ascends a snowy hillside lined with wooden totem poles and snow-covered pine trees. The terrain becomes more rugged with large rock formations visible on the left as the settlement gate appears in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified settlement entrance with wooden palisade

events.description: settlement gate with red banners becomes visible at the end of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching the fortified wooden gate of the settlement along a snow-packed trail

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with red banners hanging from the crossbeam
tall wooden spike fence extending from the gate
large red fabric banner with black symbols hanging from the gate

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as it approaches the settlement's fortified entrance. A large wooden gate with prominent red banners dominates the view, flanked by tall palisade fences. The camera moves steadily toward the gate entrance.

events.description: passing through the settlement gate into the village interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate and approaching the central longhouse where a villager stands

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the longhouse entrance facing the camera

entered.detail: traditional wooden longhouse with dragon head decorations on the roof peaks
wooden construction scaffolding and platforms near the entrance

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate, the scene opens into the settlement interior revealing a large Viking longhouse with distinctive dragon-headed roof decorations straight ahead. A villager stands near the entrance as the camera approaches, with wooden scaffolding visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a frozen waterfront through a fortified entrance and into the heart of a Viking settlement. It begins by passing through a wooden arch gate on the snowy shore, moving past a large boathouse with distant snow-covered mountains framing the horizon. As the camera leaves the waterfront, the path ascends a rugged hillside lined with pine trees and wooden totem poles before the terrain narrows toward a fortified gate. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under prominent red banners and through the palisade fences, opening into the settlement interior. Finally, the view expands to reveal a large longhouse with dragon-headed roof decorations and a nearby villager standing beside wooden scaffolding.
